violations.text: Raw animal foods (such as chicken) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as chicken nuggets) in the retail display case. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Foods rearranged during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2025

Yogurt parfait, fruit salad, desserts, etc. packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2025

The door to the outside, located in the hallway and loading dock area, are not tight-fitting. PIC to also add material to reinforce side door. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2026

The floor in the (meat Dept.) walk-in cooler and wall to the (basement) dairy walk-in cooler is in poor repair. Floor is lacking approved material in some areas and wall is buckled exposing foam and insulation. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/12/2026

An open employees' beverage container was observed stored in a food preparation area. Employees shall not drink from open beverage containers in order to prevent contamination of their hands, the container, and exposed food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2024
The hand-washing sink in the deli dept was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2024
Box were observed on the hand-washing sink in dept . A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2024

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the meat dept. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2024

(Various deli meats and cheeses) was observed held at (57-65) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2024

(Deli meats and cheese ) was observed not marked with the date of preparation after opening the packaged. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2024

(Spray container of chemicals) was stored with food, equipment, utensils, or single service items. Chemicals must be stored to prevent the contamination of clean equipment, utensils linens, and/or single service by spacing or partitioning and locating them in an area that is not above food, equipment utensils, linens, and single service articles. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2024

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2024
Dead flies and dead rodent was observed on glue traps. PIC removed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2024

The following equipment observed in poor repair: 1.door skirts in meat cooler are ripped. 2.walk cooler freezer door observed damaged. 3.deli display cooler observed with at 53DF. Service call was made Technician repaired during inspection. 4.deli display cooler doors observed off track. 5.meat department is lacking sink stoppers for 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2024
Leak was observed at the pipes for the walk in cooler in basement area and water valves attached to wall in meat department. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (back outside) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2024

The floors in all walk in coolers and deli department have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2024
The ceiling in the (produce prep ) area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 11/28/2024

The following physical facilities is in poor repair:1.wall outside of the break room observed with holes.2.meat walk in cooler floor observed lifting/bowing. 3.ceiling tiles in the produce area and basement observed missing and/or have water stains. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/28/2024

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored on top of food product in the basement. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back storage (produce) and entering meat department area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/19/2023

A hose is connected to the faucet at the mop sink. This faucet is lacking a backflow prevention device. An approved backflow prevention device is required in order to prevent backflow of a solid, liquid, or gas contaminant into the water supply at each point of use at a food establishment. New Violation. Correct By: 06/19/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the outside dumpster area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 07/12/2023

The floors in the: 1.produce dept 2.deli dept 3.meat dept 4.fans in meat department 5.floors and walls in all walk in refrigeration units area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/19/2023

The: 1.ceilings in the produce area(missing or broken tiles) 2.ceilings in the basement area(missing or broken tiles) 3.walls in the produce area(missing tiles) is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2023
Establishment is lacking sanitizing solution in at the 3 bay sinks in the meat and produce department. New Violation. Correct By: 05/17/2023

Various dairy products and juices was observed held at 43-59 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.Disposed Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/17/2023

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures in the deli department. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 05/17/2023

The door to the outside, located in the back storage(produce) is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/17/2023
Milk were observed stored on the floor in the walk in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 05/17/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of 200ppm quat sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink in the produce and meat department. New Violation. Correct By: 05/17/2023

A hose is connected to the faucet at the mop sink. This faucet is lacking a backflow prevention device. An approved backflow prevention device is required in order to prevent backflow of a solid, liquid, or gas contaminant into the water supply at each point of use at a food establishment. New Violation. Correct By: 05/26/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the outside dumpster area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2023

The floors in the: 1.produce dept 2.deli dept 3.meat dept 4.basement area 5.Fans in meat dept has an accumulation of dust, soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/17/2023

The: 1.handsink in produce dept(observed leak) 2.Ceilings in the produce area and basement area (missing or broken tiles) 3.Walls in the produce cooler(observed holes) 4.Walls entering the breakroom in basement(observed holes) 5.Storage walls in basement(holes) 6.Egg cooler doors 7.Open case cooler (ambient temperature 55 degrees Fahrenheit) is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2023
